summary: The published Linq CLI must expose generic rich messaging workflows through validated experience commands.
reason: Raw endpoint mirrors make it easy for agents to send malformed message bodies, mix invalid link preview parts, or miss protocol-specific constraints. The curated layer centralizes the nested message body contract, protocol warnings, and media/link/reaction/contact-share validation.
validated_outcome: Focused message-builder and command-wrapper tests pass; full validation is recorded in the PR.
